ratings.comment: Lectures were really slide heavy and sometimes a bit disengaging because they were 75 minute power lectures. Professor Dudley was willing to meet outside class and go through hw problems and exams if needed which was helpful. I think the more times he teaches the course, the better it will be, because I know he is a newer professor.

Lots of material covered in lectures, sometimes unclear what we needed to know. However since it was a small class he was available to communicate one-on-one with students and provided constructive feedback.
